<!-- ? ############################################# -->
<!-- ? Main Area -->

This project follows an open governance model to ensure transparency and
community involvement. Key points:

- **Decision Making**: Major decisions are made by consensus among core
  maintainers and contributors.
- **Contributions**: All contributions are welcome, and significant changes are
  discussed publicly.
- **Meetings**: Governance meetings are announced in advance and open to all
  contributors.
- **Code of Conduct**: All participants are expected to follow the
  [Code of Conduct](./CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).
